tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control, despite a low current blood glucose, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia. Creatinine is slightly low, possibly reflecting reduced muscle mass. Chloride is mildly elevated and CO₂ is low, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
